metadata.description: Custom skills for document extraction and writing

plugins.name: clear-and-concise-humanization
plugins.description: Write and edit prose that is clear, forceful, and unrecognizable as machine-generated. Ten editing passes combining Strunk's composition rules with Wikipedia AI-tell detection.

plugins.name: extract-book
plugins.description: Convert PDF books into structured Markdown with chapter detection, metadata extraction (author, publisher, ISBN, copyright), and image-page rendering. Requires pdfplumber.

plugins.name: extract-study
plugins.description: Convert research papers (IMRaD format) into structured Markdown with DOI/PMID extraction, section detection, and preserved references. Requires pdfplumber.

plugins.name: extract-transcript
plugins.description: Convert video and podcast transcripts into structured Markdown summaries. Accepts YouTube URLs or pasted text. Requires youtube_transcript_api.

plugins.name: extract-webpage
plugins.description: Extract web pages into structured Markdown with boilerplate removal. Single pages or full-site crawls. Requires trafilatura.
